column1: 彼の話し方は子ども___。（傾向）
column5: っぽい: informal -ish / tendency — speaker's subjective impression; slight negative nuance
column8: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:っぽい complexity:standard confusable-with:みたい source:shin-kanzen scaffold:pending-audio frequency:top10k

column1: 外が暗くて、雨が降る___。（見た目）
column5: みたい: looks like / seems like (based on observation); more neutral than っぽい
column8: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:っぽい complexity:standard confusable-with:みたい source:shin-kanzen scaffold:pending-audio frequency:top1k confusable-with:っぽい

column1: 最近彼女は忘れ___。（習慣的傾向）
column5: っぽい: chronic tendency toward X — she tends to forget things (behavioral pattern)
column8: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:っぽい complexity:standard confusable-with:らしい source:shin-kanzen scaffold:pending-audio frequency:top10k

column1: 彼の服は医者___。（証拠からの推測）
column5: らしい: inference from evidence — his clothes suggest a doctor; objective evidence
column8: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:っぽい complexity:standard confusable-with:らしい source:shin-kanzen scaffold:pending-audio frequency:low confusable-with:っぽい

column1: この布は安っ___。（素材の印象）
column5: っぽい with nouns: 安っぽい = cheap-looking; often negative impression
column8: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:っぽい complexity:standard confusable-with:みたい source:shin-kanzen scaffold:pending-audio frequency:low

column1: 彼は本当に男___性格だ。（典型的）
column5: らしい (noun-attached): typical of X — 男らしい = manly, typical of a man; positive
column8: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:っぽい complexity:standard confusable-with:らしい source:shin-kanzen scaffold:pending-audio frequency:top10k confusable-with:っぽい
